title: diplycosia luzonica var. calelanensis
intro: Diplycosia luzonica var. calelanensis, also known as Calelan diplycosia, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the Diplycosia genus, native to the Philippines. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Diplycosia luzonica var. calelanensis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, with some herbal preparations also utilizing the plant's leaves and stems to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
